Christopher Cato

Senior Software Engineer & Architect

About Me

Christopher Cato is a senior developer and architect with over 30 years of experience working in complex system environments. I quickly get up to speed with existing solutions, understand the bigger picture, and identify what actually needs to be done to move forward.

My background spans system development, architecture, data/AI, and DevOps, but I thrive most in hands-on roles focused on problem solving, stabilization, and incremental improvement of existing systems. I work pragmatically and value solutions that work in reality over theoretically "perfect" approaches.

I have broad technical experience in backend development, integrations, and data platforms, as well as experience working in cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure) and Linux/Unix-based systems.

In my spare time I enjoy literature, cooking, fishing, training, and spending time with family.

Learn more about Christopher Cato, explore technologies, review key strengths, or hire Christopher Cato.

Contact: cato.christopher@gmail.com
